publicProductClaim: Open Cowork is launch-ready for local/self-host beta evaluation through public Compose, Helm, Cloud Web, Desktop sync, Gateway, BYOK-stub/manual, validators, and CI gates. This does not claim managed public SaaS, GA, or enterprise-scale readiness.
privateEvidenceBoundary: The public repo stores evidence contracts, public-safe templates, validators, and redacted summaries only. Real customer evidence, managed SaaS domains, cloud project ids, prices, support rosters, raw logs, screenshots, metrics exports, cost data, and incident evidence stay in private operations repositories.

local-self-host-beta.description: Public OSS/deployer beta for local and self-host reference deployments.
acceptedClaims: self-host deployers can use public Compose and Helm templates without private SaaS patches
launch-readiness, deployment, private-beta, and operations validators are repeatable
Cloud Web, Desktop cloud sync, and Gateway continuation are covered by public tests and smoke scripts
public templates are placeholder-only and private-value scanned

private-beta.description: Design-partner hosted BYOK rollout. Claim only after private environment load, soak, restore, failover, and support evidence is attached outside this public repo.

public-beta.description: Public hosted BYOK rollout after private-beta evidence, billing, quotas, abuse controls, and support process are proven.

general-availability.description: Stable hosted product claim after public beta burn-in, release packaging, security, restore, and support evidence are proven.

enterprise-scale.description: Large-organization readiness after lower tiers pass and enterprise capacity/SLO evidence exists.

coveredSurfaces: Gateway delivery feed and render backpressure
BYOK reveal failure and denial paths
loadAndSoak.passCondition: Plan generation is public-CI validated; environment-specific load and soak must be run in strict mode before claiming any hosted tier.

coveredSurfaces: lease expiry and stale-owner write rejection
scheduler restart with due workflow runs
Gateway restart with delivery cursor resume
Cloud Web/API restart with SSE reconnect
failoverRecovery.passCondition: Public tests and templates cover recovery contracts; managed tiers require private drill evidence from the target environment.

coveredSurfaces: BYOK secret references and reveal denial behavior
backupRestore.passCondition: Restore evidence templates and validators are public-safe; each real hosted environment must attach private restore-drill output.

coveredSurfaces: operator endpoints separate from tenant user APIs
trusted-header auth cannot imply admin without explicit trusted proof
OpenCode SDK and server-only package import boundaries
public templates contain no private values
securityBoundary.passCondition: Security boundaries must be enforced by tests, validators, and docs before any higher launch tier is claimed.

coveredSurfaces: Cloud Web build and browser smoke
releasePackaging.passCondition: CI and release checklists fail closed when a required surface-specific gate disappears.

findingsWorkflow.passCondition: Every failed launch gate is either fixed immediately, turned into a narrow issue with evidence/reproduction, or recorded as out-of-scope for the selected launch tier.
